message:
refactor(raptorq): replace soliton distribution tests with RFC tuple equation tests

The RobustSoliton distribution was removed during the systematic encoder
refactor (minimum-degree pivot strategy, commit 957c50b). These tests
exercised the old soliton sampling API which no longer exists.

Replace with RFC tuple equation conformance tests that exercise the
current SystematicParams::rfc_repair_equation() interface:

- rfc_tuple_equation_degree_coverage: for k in {10, 50, 100, 500},
  generates 1024 repair equations per block and verifies columns/
  coefficients length parity, non-empty equations, column indices
  within L bounds, and at least 3 distinct effective degrees per k

- rfc_tuple_equation_deterministic_across_runs: verifies that the
  same ESI range produces identical equation output (deterministic),
  while different ESI ranges produce different equations

Removes unused RobustSoliton import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
